heading: Distribution of assets on dissolution or final liquidation
label: 190112 Distribution of assets on dissolution or final liquidation
text: On dissolution or final liquidation of the corporation, any assets remaining after the discharge of all liabilities shall be divided equally among the then active officers and members.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)19011236:231 (words after 2d comma).(words after 2d comma), .June 30, 1950, ch. 431, § 1164 Stat. 314The word “satisfaction” is omitted as included in “discharge”, and the word “obligations” is omitted as included in “liabilities”. The word “outstanding” is omitted as unnecessary.
